name: raw-snapshot
status: provenance-only — NOT deployed (see normalized-100m.json for the live distribution)
description: Original, unnormalized Substrate->EVM migration snapshot. Preserved for history and reproducibility of the normalize-down. Sourced from packages/migration-claim/.

substrate.claim: SP1 Groth16 zk-proof of Substrate key ownership + merkle proof

treasury.claim: direct carveout to the protocol treasury (Substrate treasury module account)
treasury.note: the only adjustable bucket; reduced in normalized-100m

foundation.claim: direct carveout to the foundation (30% unlocked at start, rest vests ~3yr)

note: These amounts are the Sepolia-config canonical totals; the raw merkle-tree.json totals differ slightly and ~3.19M is expired-unclaimed. The CANONICAL mainnet snapshot must be regenerated before deploy (see README).
